title: Generated Pattern Guide Manifest
description: Machine-readable index written to <site>/guide.json. It is the source of truth for chapter order, navigation, the fly-out Table of Contents, and the active stylesheet. The skill reads it to add chapters or re-skin a guide, then regenerates every page's navigation from it.

siteTitle.description: Short brand name shown in the header and hero.

guideTitle.description: Hero heading on the Table of Contents page (may contain <em>).

guideSubhead.description: One-line description of what the guide teaches.

patternName.description: General-purpose name of the derived development pattern (e.g. 'Singleton-backed Data Library').

source.description: What the guide was derived from. Names elsewhere in the guide are generalized; the sole exception is the 'sourced-repository' chapter, which describes this real repo using its real identifiers.

location.description: Original path or URL the pattern was derived from.

stylesheet.description: Filename of the active global stylesheet inside assets/ (default 'default-global.css', or a user-supplied 'style-guide.css').

styleSource.description: Optional path/URL of a user-supplied style-guide.html used to derive the look. Absent when the default style is used.

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapters. Order in this array IS the reading order and drives prev/next plus the TOC.

number.description: 1-based display number; the Table of Contents page is typically 0 (index.html).

subtitle.description: Subhead shown under the title and as the TOC entry description.

type.description: Role of the chapter. Required chapters use their fixed type; pattern chapters use 'pattern'.

examples.guideSubhead: Learn the pattern behind a single shared database access point.

chapters.title: Introduction
chapters.subtitle: What this pattern does at its core

chapters.title: Sourced Repository
chapters.subtitle: The real codebase this pattern was derived from

chapters.title: High Level Architecture
chapters.subtitle: Core systems and how they interact

chapters.title: Helpful Resources
chapters.subtitle: Docs and references for the stack
